reason: Goal, D1-D5 decisions, MVP M1-M5, 8 acceptance criteria — drives every implementation step.
Module boundary diagram, case schema with negatives, baseline JSON shape, CI workflow shape, deterministic config_hash.
Ordered 6-step checklist with per-step validation commands and rollback points.
Test layering, dependency rules, deterministic test expectations — the new eval suites and baseline scripts must follow them.
ServiceError shape conventions for new error paths (missing baseline file, malformed jsonl, negatives schema errors).
Forbidden high-cardinality fields (raw query text, source-file lists). Eval reports may contain these — must check what gets logged vs persisted.
Module placement (eval/, scripts/, tests/fixtures/eval/baselines/, .github/workflows/) — keep new files in canonical locations.
negatives field flows dataset.py → matching.py → runner.py → report.py; cross-layer consistency check.
Reuse ExpectedRelevance / _matches() / _parse_relevant — do not duplicate match logic for negatives.
